title: Daily Source Digest
note: Daily source-balanced news digest — morning update.

stories.title: Two US service members killed in Jordan after breakdown of Iran ceasefire
stories.summary:
Two US service members killed in Jordan after breakdown of Iran ceasefire. Two United States service members were killed in Jordan during Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks, U.S. Central Command said on Saturday.

“On July 17, two U.S. service members in Jordan were killed in action as U.S. Central Command (CENTCOM) and partner forces defended against Iranian ballistic missile and drone attacks,” CENTCOM wrote. “Additionally, one […].

BBC: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan. BBC reports that the announcement comes after Jordan said it intercepted 10 Iranian missiles fired into its airspace overnight into Saturday.

stories.summary:
Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes. Drones targeted Wildberries facilities near Moscow and in Tambov.

Ukraine's leader called them "major logistics facilities" supplying "sanctioned components".

stories.title: Seven Killed, Dozens Injured in Ukraine Drone Strikes Across Russia
stories.summary:
Seven Killed, Dozens Injured in Ukraine Drone Strikes Across Russia. Seven people were killed and 51 others were wounded in Russia overnight by Ukrainian drone attacks, Russian officials said Saturday.

The post Seven Killed, Dozens Injured in Ukraine Drone Strikes Across Russia appeared first on Breitbart .

Al Jazeera: Ukrainian drone attacks on Russia kill at least 8, wound dozens. Al Jazeera reports that russian officials say strikes on retailer's warehouses caused civilian casualties; Kyiv says sites used to make drones.

stories.title: Ralph Norman announces run for Lindsay Graham’s Senate seat
stories.summary:
Ralph Norman announces run for Lindsay Graham’s Senate seat. Rep. Ralph Norman (R-SC) announced Saturday that he was running to replace Sen. Lindsey Graham’s seat in the upcoming South Carolina special election. “For years, Senator Lindsey Graham fought hard to save America and defend South Carolina,” Norman said in a news release.

“Now, President Trump needs another proven America First conservative in the US […]. Fox News: Rep Ralph Norman enters South Carolina Senate race despite Trump's endorsement of Darline Graham.

Fox News reports that ralph Norman says he's running for the South Carolina Senate seat despite Trump's endorsement of Darline Graham, vowing to nuke the filibuster.

stories.title: Venezuela earthquakes death toll surpasses 5,000
stories.summary:
Venezuela earthquakes death toll surpasses 5,000. CARACAS (AP) — The death toll from the two powerful earthquakes that shook Venezuela last month rose to 5,069 late on Friday, local authorities said.

The interim government of President Delcy Rodriguez added in a statement that the number of injured remains unchanged at 16,740, as in the past 11 days.

Ongoing recovery and debris-clearing operations have […]. Washington Times reports that the death toll from the two powerful earthquakes that shook Venezuela last month rose to 5,069 late on Friday, local authorities said.

stories.title: Carville: Networks Should Have Aired Trump's Speech to Show He's 'Literally Crazy'
stories.summary:
Carville: Networks Should Have Aired Trump's Speech to Show He's 'Literally Crazy'. Friday on CNN's "The Situation," veteran Democratic political analyst James Carville said all the networks should have aired President Donald Trump's election fraud speech live to show voters that the president was "literally crazy." The post Carville: Networks Should Have Aired Trump’s Speech to Show He’s ‘Literally Crazy’ appeared firs.

Fox News: James Carville explains why he thinks mainstream media networks made a mistake avoiding Trump’s speech. Fox News reports that james Carville told CNN's Wolf Blitzer that networks made a mistake by not airing Trump's primetime address, saying voters deserved to judge it.

stories.title: ‘It’s only going to get worse’: wildfires forcing firefighters to make impossible choices
stories.summary:
‘It’s only going to get worse’: wildfires forcing firefighters to make impossible choices. As the climate crisis fuels more intense blazes, pushing them to new parts of the world, those tackling them are forced to ration resources and decide which to fight César Alcaraz had only just become a firefighter in the late 1990s when he found himself ambushed by a fast-moving blaze.

Barely able to breathe and with no more water left in his truck, he and his colleagues fled an inferno ravaging Spain’s Montgó mountain region, wishing their bosses had sent more support. But nearl.

stories.title: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
stories.summary:
Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them. Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission.

The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unauthorized AI training.

stories.summary:
‘There’s this deep mystery of what, actually, is this thing?’: the philosopher inside Google DeepMind AI – podcast. Since 2017, Iason Gabriel has worked at the tech giant, trying to anticipate – and think through – the impact of AI.

By Robert P Baird. Read by Simon Darwen Read the text version here Support the.

stories.summary:
Iloilo, Negros Occidental back stronger municipal waters protection.

MANILA, Philippines — The fisherfolk group Pambansang Lakas ng Kilusang Mamamalakaya ng Pilipinas (Pamalakaya) on Friday welcomed recent actions by local officials in Iloilo and Negros Occidental, saying the moves reflect growing support among some local governments for efforts to protect the country’s municipal waters.

stories.title: DICT distributes 36,140 Bayanihan SIM cards to Bicol learners
stories.summary:
DICT distributes 36,140 Bayanihan SIM cards to Bicol learners.

LEGAZPI CITY, Quezon— The Department of Information and Communications Technology (DICT) has distributed 36,140 Bayanihan SIM cards to kindergarten to grade 6 learners across the Bicol region as part of the government’s efforts to expand internet access and support digital learning.

Cyryl Montales, DICT-Bicol information officer, said the SIM cards, each preloaded with 25 gigabytes.

stories.summary:

stories.title: Sibuyan Island gecko discovered as new species endemic to Romblon
stories.summary:
Sibuyan Island gecko discovered as new species endemic to Romblon. MANILA, Philippines — Scientists have identified a new gecko species found only on Sibuyan Island in Romblon, adding to the island’s growing list of endemic wildlife and reinforcing its reputation as one of the country’s biodiversity hotspots.

The Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) Mimaropa welcomed the discovery of Luperosaurus alvarezi, saying it further.
